description_long: This object is a rectangular, dual-component CD player system, featuring a stacked design with a main unit and a secondary unit below. The front panel displays a digital screen with blue illumination, several round control buttons, and a large rotary knob, likely for volume or menu navigation. The lower unit also has a blue-lit display, possibly indicating track or playback information. The rear side is equipped with multiple input and output ports, including RCA connectors, switches, and power sockets, suggesting compatibility with various audio systems. The exterior is predominantly matte black, with a ribbed texture on the top surface for heat dissipation. The overall build appears robust, with a hard plastic or metal casing and clear functional separation between the two stacked units.
description: A dual-unit, black CD player system with blue digital displays, multiple control buttons, and extensive rear audio connections. The design is robust and functional, suitable for integration into home or urban audio setups.
description_view_0: Front view showing two blue digital displays, multiple round control buttons, and a large rotary knob.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the stacked, rectangular form and ribbed top surface, with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a variety of audio input/output ports, switches, and power sockets for connectivity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain, ribbed surface and stacked design.
